utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 of these items. Each item is fully specified: the property section has details (type, location, price, size, bedrooms, layout, features, move-in date); the financing section includes method, down payment, percentage, interest rate, and term; the legal_services section includes package, multiple cost components; the moving_services section specifies level, cost, and included services; the setup_services section includes package type, cost, and included utilities; and total_budget provides a full cost breakdown with total and currency. Therefore, all 6 items are included and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution shows a purchase of a Condo in Downtown Toronto at CAD 480,000 with eco-friendly and smart home features. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the property that best matches this description is 'New Build', which is priced at CAD 480K and rated 10. Financing used is 'Mortgage' with a 20% down payment, aligning most closely with the 'Traditional Mortgage' option (80% LTV) that has a rating of 8. The legal services used are clearly the 'Premium Legal Package', rated 8. The moving services mention 'Standard/Premium' with cost 1200, which aligns with 'Premium Moving' (price CAD 1200, rating 7). The setup services package is 'Basic' with a cost of 280, which maps to 'Premium Utilities' (price CAD 280, rating 9) — this is the only package with that price point and similar inclusions (electricity, water, internet, smart meters).
